findings.evidence: No DKIM records found for any of the common selectors on localhost
findings.details: No DKIM TXT records found at common selectors (default, google, selector1, selector2, mail, k1). Without DKIM, recipients cannot verify that emails were sent by authorised servers and email contents may be modified in transit.
No DMARC record exists. Without DMARC, email receivers have no policy guidance for handling SPF/DKIM failures, enabling phishing and email spoofing.
